title: Nada and the Vision Behind Merrachi
excerpt: From a living room in the Netherlands to modest fashion destinations around the world — the story of how Merrachi was built on heritage, craft, and a deep belief that Muslim women deserve beautiful clothes.
pullQuote: A brand rooted in Moroccan heritage and European craft, built for Muslim women around the world.

interview.question: The Brand
interview.answer: Merrachi was founded by Nada Merrachi, a Dutch-Moroccan designer who grew up between two worlds — the clean lines of European fashion and the richness of Moroccan textile tradition. Drawing on both, she began creating modest pieces that felt contemporary and culturally rooted at the same time. What started as a small creative endeavor became one of the most recognized names in modest fashion.

interview.question: The Craft
interview.answer: Merrachi is known for its embroidery, carefully considered silhouettes, and an aesthetic that feels both elevated and deeply personal. Each collection reflects Nada's commitment to designing pieces that honor tradition without being bound by it — clothes made for celebrations, ceremonies, and the everyday moments that matter.

interview.question: The Reach
interview.answer: Today, Merrachi ships globally and has found its way into the wardrobes of women across the United States, Europe, and beyond. The brand has built a loyal community drawn to its quality and its point of view — modest fashion that does not ask you to compromise on beauty or identity.
